speaker: Seeker
text: Naye sasural mein abhi adjustment ho hi raha tha ki pati ne announce kiya ki unke maa-baap permanently shift ho rahe hain. Kehte hain meri age 35+ hai toh unhe 'waaris' ki jaldi hai. Mera mann unhe mana karne ka tha par divorcee hone ke darr se maine muh nahi khola. Bas chup-chap unka swagat kiya taaki kalesh na ho.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the relational element of swallowing her voice to prevent conflict and preserve the marriage.
text: Apni nayi zindagi ke is shuruati waqt mein apne hi mann ki aawaz ko daba kar, sirf ghar ki shanti aur rishte ko tutne se bachane ke liye tumne khud ko bilkul chota kar liya...

speaker: Seeker
text: Chota hi kar liya hai maine. I mean, main office aur ghar dono manage kar rahi hoon, aur ab achanak se unka move in karna. Par main bolti toh maike ki 'izzat' mitti mein mil jati na.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the burden of duty and the weight of managing both realms.
text: Pehle hi office aur ek nayi bahu hone ki double duties ko akele sambhalte hue, ab is maike ki izzat ki fikr ne tumhare kandhon par ek achanak aur bojh daal diya hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Bojh itna bada hai ki mujhe saans nahi aa rahi. Mujhe apni thodi si personal space aur waqt ki aadat hai. Par bade-buzurgo ka samman karna padega. Isliye kalesh ke darr se maine muh nahi khola.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the feared consequence of losing all personal space permanently.
text: Aane wale poore waqt mein apni us chhoti si personal saans lene ki jagah ko hamesha ke liye kho dene ka ye khayal andar hi andar ghutan paida kar raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Ghutan toh hai hi. Par kya kar sakti hoon? 35 ki age mein pehli shadi hui hai. Divorcee ka tag laga toh log toh taane maar-maar ke jeena haram kar denge. Isliye maine chup rehna theek samjha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Stigma cue response: short restatement focusing on the relational pressure, ending in a soft pause.
text: Samaj ki un baaton aur divorce ke us darr ne tumhari apni zaruraton ki aawaz ko poori tarah se band kar diya hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Band toh hona hi tha. Pati ne mujhse ek baar pucha tak nahi. Bas seedha faisla suna diya. Aisa lagta hai is ghar mein meri marzi ya aaram ki koi ahmiyat hi nahi hai, sirf waaris ki hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Inviting exploration of the deepest feeling of isolation and lack of value.
text: Jab ek itne bade faisle mein life partner ne hi tumhari marzi ya maujudgi ko bilkul ansoona kar diya, tab andar hi andar sabse zyada takleef kis baat ki hoti hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Takleef is baat ki hai ki unhe sirf ek bacha paida karne wali body chahiye jisko in laws monitor kar sake. Meri apni identity kuch hai hi nahi is relationship mein. Main ekdum trapped mehsoos kar rahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Naming the specific unexpressed emotion for Relational Preservation + C3 (Trapped/Helpless).
text: Lagta hai ki is achanak aaye faisle aur apni value ko sirf ek 'waaris' tak simat te hue dekh kar tumhe poori tarah se ek aise rishte mein trapped aur helpless feel hone laga hai jahan tumhara wajood mit raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Wajood mitne wali baat hi toh darati hai mujhe sabse zyada. Office ke baad ghar aake unka taana sunna padega bacche ke liye. Gussa itna aata hai pati par, par chillaungi toh ghar mein hi mera jeena haram kar denge.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her anger and normalizing the structural burden on women in India.
text: Aisi situation mein pati par gussa aana aur wajood mitne ka darr lagna bilkul natural hai. Humari society mein izzat aur bado ke samman ka saara bojh aksar auraton pe daal diya jata hai, par us dabaav mein gussa aana tumhari koi weakness nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thank you ki aap meri baat bina judge kiye sun rahe hain. Mera maike mein koi support nahi hai, unko lagta hai shadi theek chal rahi hai. Main waqai akele apne aansu pee rahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Sharing a systemic pattern of new brides suffering silently to maintain the illusion of a perfect marriage.
text: Naye sasural ke is adjustment mein aurat ka akele ghutna bohot common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin log khul ke rote bhi nahi kyunki maike ki 'izzat' aur kalesh ka darr humein chup rehna sikhata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aap bilkul theek keh rahe ho. Isliye toh maine muh nahi khola jab mummy papa aaye. Par ab meri energy ekdum zero ho gayi hai. Lagta hai aage wali life sirf ek jail hogi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Responding to mild risk and stigma cue with a warm normalizing statement and restating the feeling of exhaustion.
text: Aisa darr aana bahut human hai, tumhara akele itna sehna sach mein thaka dene wala hai... Aage ke poore waqt ko ek kaid ki tarah dekhna, andar aisi bechaini paida kar raha hai jahan saari energy khatam hoti mehsoos ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bechaini itni hai ki focus nahi kar pa rahi office mein. Ab jab woh rehne aa hi gaye hain toh divorce nahi le sakti na main us kalesh ke darr se. Koi aisi trick batao ki main ghar mein apni shanti thodi si bacha sakun?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemic reframe to separate duty from giving up 100% of personal time.
text: Humare yahan aksar man liya jata hai ki bade-buzurgo ke sath rehne ka matlab hai apna pura time unhe dena, lekin working women ke liye office ka waqt ya zaroori aaram unki izzat ya duty ke khilaf nahi hota.

speaker: Seeker
text: Par agar main directly time maangungi toh unhe lagega bahu mein sanskar nahi hain. Koi aisa raasta hai jahan bina lafde ke meri daily 1 hour ki akele baithne ki aadat maintain rahe?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering small, non-confrontational ways to establish boundaries fitting her working persona.
text: Do choti cheezein hum dekh sakte hain: Pehla, office se ghar laut te waqt raste mein 15-20 minute kahin shanti se akele time nikalna 'heavy traffic' bol kar. Dusra, subah ya raat mein ek fix time pe 'office ki urgent preparation' ke liye door band karna.

speaker: Seeker
text: Office preparation wala acha idea hai. Unko bhi pata hai meri job kitni demanding hai. Wahan izzat wala scene nahi aayega, ulta unhe lagega bahu bahut mehnati hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Breaking down the suggestion into an immediate step.
text: Pehle bas apne mind mein ek routine fix karo ki roz raat khana khane ke baad, woh 30 minute tumhara apne laptop ke sath kamre mein 'urgent kaam' wala waqt hoga... bas itni si preparation aaj shuru karte hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek hai, 30 minute apne room mein bina kisi disturbance ke. Main chup toh rahi aur unke aane par maine muh nahi khola, par main dhire dheere ye routine apna lungi toh ghutan thodi kam hogi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting her intelligent way of surviving the relational duty.
text: Ghar ki shanti aur rishton ki maryada dono bachate hue, apne us ek chhote se hisse ko dhundhne ka tumhara yeh raasta sach mein kaafi samajhdari bhara hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Shanti aur maryada dono zaroori hain. Waaris ke sawaalon ka jawab dena bhi dhundh lungi waqt ke sath, main directly unse argue nahi karungi. Mujhe thoda normal feel ho raha hai is practical approach se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Inviting her to reflect on her feeling of agency despite the trap.
text: Ek samay jahan sab kuch ekdum fansa hua aur helpless lag raha tha, wahan se apne haq ki yeh choti shanti dhoondh kar abhi tumhara mann kaisa feel kar raha hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Kafi hadd tak halka. Ek feeling aa rahi hai ki control poori tarah mere hath se nahi gaya hai. Main bhi theek perform kar lungi bina apne aap ko exhaust kiye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her intelligence in keeping her peace while respecting elders.
text: Itni achanak aayi zimmewariyon ke beech bhi apna ye thoda sa control wapas haasil karne ki himmat dikhana tumhari ek bohot badi strength hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Himmat laani padegi. Is divorce ke tag se darr kar hi maine muh nahi khola, par chalo, kam se kam mujhe ek apna quiet time mil gaya. Thank you so much mujhe itna dhyan se sunne ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting her transition from passive silence to active self-care over time.
text: Poore din jis darr se chup chap saari baatein maan li gayi thi, waqt beetne ke sath apni usi chuppi ko apni shanti banakar istemal karna ek naya hausla dikhata hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan hausla aa gaya hai. Main abhi thoda pani peekar relax karti hoon, kal office mein bhi dhyan dena hai varna boss suna dega alag se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirming that preserving career helps preserve individual identity.
text: Working bahu ke liye unka career unhe ek bahut zaroori confidence deta hai, aur usi routine ka fayda uthakar aaram nikalna bilkul naturally ek achhi boundary hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Absolutely. Career is very important to me. Wahi meri ekmatra alag identity hai is pariwar se. Usko main nahi kharab kar sakti in sab tension mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Gentle final check-in on her present state.
text: Apni is mehnat wali pehchaan ko bachaye rakhne aur aaj ki bhari tension ko theek se address karne ke baad, kya ab tum shanti se raat nikal paogi?

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, ab nikal jayegi raat aaram se. Aaj ka ye gussa aur darr dono nikal gaye finally meri baat sunne wale ke samne.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the relief brought by safely unburdening her emotions.
text: Us bhari darr aur akelapan ko ek bar kisi ke aage poori tarah utar dene ke baad jo relief aur halke pan ka ehsaas aata hai, wahi sacchi zarurat thi...

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha apne. Main kaafi light mehsoos kar rahi hoon. Main abhi aaram karti hoon aur kal theek mind se apna din shuru karungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Closing by acknowledging her capability to balance her life.
text: Tum apni zimmedariyan nibhane mein bohot capable ho, aur is fresh aur shant mann ke sath kal ka din bohot behtar shuru hoga. Apni boundary ka dhyan rakhna.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bas unki haan mein haan mila rahi hoon
text: In-laws ne decide kiya hai ki wo yahi rahenge taaki mujh par child pressure bana sakein, kyunki samaj mein sab keh rahe hain ki main ek 'expired' single mother hoon. Main unse bahas nahi kar sakti kyunki unhone mujh jaisi talaqshuda aurat ko apnaya hai, isliye maine apne saare darr aur sawaal daba liye hain. Unhe naraz karke main apna thoda bahut bacha hua thikana khona afford nahi kar sakti, isliye bas unki haan mein haan mila rahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relational conflict and helplessness the Seeker feels between owing gratitude and being pressured.
text: Unke ehsaan aur apne thikane ki fikar ke beech, tum khud ko apne hi ghar mein ek tarah se fasa hua mehsoos kar rahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Fasi hui toh hoon hi. Samaj mein waise hi sab mujhe 'expired' bolte hain. Ab agar ek aur baby layungi tabhi shayad inki family complete lagegi unko.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the feared consequence of losing support if she doesn't comply.
text: Ye dar andar hi andar kha raha hai ki agar unki baat nahi maani, toh jo thoda sa sahara aur samman mila hai, wo bhi chheen jayega.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bas unki haan mein haan mila rahi hoon
text: Sahi kaha aapne. Main apne bacche ka future risk mein nahi daal sakti in sab ke chakkar mein. Mere paas koi aur raasta hi nahi hai, isliye bas unki haan mein haan mila rahi hoon chupchaap.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Probe gently into how suppressing her own needs is affecting her emotionally, following two restatements.
text: Tumne apne bacche ke future ko itni priority di hai ki apni aawaz daba li, par is khamoshi ka tumhare apne dil par rozana kya asar ho raha hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Dil toh ghutta hai mera har roz. Ek single mother hona is desh mein waise hi kisi paap se kam nahi hai, har koi ajeeb nazron se judge karta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge the stigma cue safely without trying to fix it, using a short reflection ending with a soft pause.
text: Logon ke taane aur apne bacche ki duty ke boj tale, tum akele hi sab kuch bardasht kar rahi ho...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, kabhi kabhi lagta hai ki main bas ehsaan tale itni dab gayi hoon ki meri apni koi zindagi hi nahi bachi hai. Na unhe mana kar sakti hoon, na khud aise jee sakti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the core feeling of being trapped/helpless due to the cultural pressure and relational preservation.
text: Lagta hai is rishte ko bachane ki koshish aur obligations ke beech, tum khud ko puri tarah se bebas aur trapped mehsoos kar rahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bebas... bilkul yahi word hai mere halat ke liye. Bahut thakan hoti hai mentally, par koi samajhne wala nahi hai yahan.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate her exhaustion as culturally normal, separating her self-worth from fulfilling in-laws' expectations.
text: Ye thakan aur bebasi bilkul laazmi hai. Humari society mein ek aurat se aksar ye umeed ki jati hai ki wo sab kuch seh le, khaaskar apne bacche ki khatir, par tumhari value is baat se tay nahi hoti ki tum in-laws ke demands kitne pure karti ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bas unki haan mein haan mila rahi hoon
text: Sun ke sach mein thoda sukoon mila. Warna mujhe hi lagta tha main ungrateful hoon. Par samajh nahi aata kab tak bas unki haan mein haan mila rahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Share a brief systemic anecdote about women in similar situations hiding their pain out of duty, normalising her struggle.
text: Humare yahan bahut si auraton ki yahi kashmakash hoti hai—koi bolta nahi kyunki samaj aur ehsaan ke dabaav mein auraton ki apni feelings ke liye jagah chodi hi nahi jati. Tum akele nahi ho is safar mein.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sach mein, bahar se dekho toh sab theek lagta hai. Meri apni maa bhi yahi bolti thi ki sasural wale jo kahein bas wahi karo bina sawaal kiye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the length of time and conditioning she has endured.
text: Itne lambe samay se tum apne aas-paas sabhi se yahi seekhti aa rahi ho ki khud ki chahaton ko bhula kar sirf ghar walon ki sunni chahiye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Wahi seekha aur wahi kiya maine. Par ab himmat toot rahi hai. Mujhe samajh nahi aa raha ab kya karoon main aise mahaul mein?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide a systemic reframe on the pressure she is facing, depersonalizing the conflict.
text: Ye jo 'ehsaan' yaad dilane ka dabaav hai, ye asal mein ek tarah ka samajik control hota hai. Ye tumhari koi personal kami nahi hai ki tum is expectation se pareshan ho rahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Control hi toh hai, bas ehsaan ka cover pehna hua hai. Par isse niklun kaise bina kisi bade jhagde ke, kyunki ladne ki taqat nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer 2 simple, culturally-aligned strategies to deflect pressure without triggering direct conflict.
text: Jab agli baar wo child pressure wali baat shuru karein, toh sidhe inkaar karne ki jagah hum dhyan batane ke liye uth kar kisi aur kaam mein lag sakte hain, ya phir 'abhi sirf is bacche ki padhai par focus hai' bol kar baat ko halke mein taal sakte hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Topic taal dena thoda asaan lag raha hai waise. Jhagda karne ya clear mana karne ka toh main soch bhi nahi sakti.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk through one simple suggestion step-by-step for immediate use.
text: Pehle bas unki baat sun kar ek gehri saans lo, bina koi react kiye chacha ya kaam ka bahana bana kar wahan se hat jao... bas itna hi koshish karo pehle.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek hai, main wahan se physically hatne ki koshish karungi jab aisi baat aayegi. Shayad isse us waqt ka tension kam ho jaye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her desire to find peace while keeping the relationship intact.
text: Tum apne rishte ko bachate hue bhi khud ko us ghutan se bachaane ka ek chhota sa, safe raasta nikalna chahti ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, dimaag ko shanti chahiye mujhe bas. Mere bacche ko meri zaroorat hai, main ab aur mental torture nahi jhel sakti.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Prompt her to think of a small self-oriented action to rebuild strength.
text: Bacche ka future aur apni himmat banaye rakhne ke is safar mein, din bhar mein tum apna khayal rakhne ka kaun sa ek chhota tareeqa nikal sakti ho?

speaker: Seeker
text: Shayad bacche ke so jane ke baad 10 minute akele ek cup chai pee sakti hoon bina kisi ki aawaz sune. Wahi thoda sukoon ka waqt hota hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate this small step as meaningful and well-deserved.
text: Akele baith kar wo chai ka cup peena tumhara poora haq hai. Din bhar ke dabaav ke baad, aise chhote efforts hi andar ki taqat wapas laate hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aapki baaton se thoda halke pan ka ehsaas ho raha hai. Main aaj raat koshish karungi wo 10 minute khud ke liye nikalne ki.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize the difficulty of prioritizing oneself after a long period of conditioning.
text: Society ne hamesha se auraton ko sirf sacrifice karna sikhaya hai, isliye shuru mein apne liye 10 minute nikalna bhi thoda ajeeb lag sakta hai, aur ye normal hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul, pehle hamesha lagta tha ki main bahut matlabi ho rahi hoon. Par ab feel ho raha hai ki meri akele ki bhi koi ehmiyat hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the shift from helplessness to a faint sense of personal identity.
text: Lagta hai ki is lambi ghutan ke baad ab dheere dheere tum apne andar ki us azaadi aur pehchaan ko phir se mehsoos kar pa rahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Pehchaan toh abhi banani baaki hai, par haan wo lachaari thodi kam hui hai. Mujhe yaad dilane ke liye shukriya ki mera bhi wajood hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide another low-effort option to reconnect with herself.
text: Tum apne routine mein kabhi kabhi kisi purane dost se 5 minute baat karna ya koi chhoti si hobby shamil kar sakti ho, jo sirf tumhari khushi ke liye ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Meri ek college ki friend hai jisse baat kiye hue mahino ho gaye hain. Usko call kar sakti hoon kal din mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her initiative to reclaim her role as a friend, shifting from duty as a mother/daughter-in-law.
text: Ek maa aur bahu ki zimmedariyon ke beech, tum aakhirkar apne us purane, azaad hisse ko wapas jagane ki koshish kar rahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, wo friend thoda meri situation samajhti thi pehle bhi. Usse baat karungi toh shayad akelapan thoda kam feel ho.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirm that reconnecting with support systems is a sign of strength.
text: Apne purane aur safe rishton ko phir se jode rakhna sach mein badi himmat ka kaam hai, aur tumhare akelepan ko todne ka sabse natural step bhi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi keh rahe hain aap. Main abhi usko ek chhota sa message drop kar deti hoon ki jab time mile mujhe call kare.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the positive consequence of taking a step towards her own mental well-being.
text: Is naye kadam ko uthane ke baad, wo jo log kya kahenge wala dar tha, wo ab dheere dheere kamzor pad raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main unke aage zubaan nahi chala sakti
text: Pati ne bina mujhse pooche in-laws ka permanent shift fix kar diya. Unhe lagta hai ki meri badhti umar mein guidance ki zaroorat hai. Mujhe meri economic precarity aur bacchon ke future ki itni chinta hai, par main unke aage zubaan nahi chala sakti kyunki beti aur bahu ka farz hamesha sehne ka hota hai. Maine apne saare suppressed ambitions kurban kar diye taaki sasural mein tamasha na bane aur parivaar ki maryada bani rahe. Main andar se puri tarah tut chuki hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the deep sacrifice made for family peace while responding to the stigma cue with a soft pause.
text: Aapke pati ke is achanak faisle ke baad, ghar ki maryada aur bacchon ki khatir aapne apne hi sapno ko bilkul khamosh kar diya hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main unke aage zubaan nahi chala sakti
text: Haan, khamosh hi toh kiya hai. Kyunki agar main kuch bolungi toh ghar mein itna bada kalesh hoga. Main unke aage zubaan nahi chala sakti, chahe andar hi andar kitna bhi despair feel ho raha ho. Meri is ghar mein value hi kya hai, bas ek silent spectator ki tarah sab sehte raho.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring her fear of confrontation and the resultant helplessness.
text: Ghar mein kalesh hone aur rishton ke tootne ke darr ne aapko apne hi ghar mein sirf ek darshak bankar rehne par majboor kar diya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Exactly. Aur sabse badi baat hai meri economic precarity. Main financially puri tarah un par dependent hoon. Agar main bacchon ke future ke liye kuch bolti bhi hoon, toh seedha taana milta hai. Badhti umar bolkar mujhe hamesha neecha dikhaya jata hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Highlighting the long-standing duration of this dependency and its weight.
text: Itne lamba waqt is financial dependence aur taano ke bojh ko sehte hue guzra hai ki ab aage ka safar aur bhi mushkil lagne laga hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Din bhar bas yahi chinta khaati hai ki is mahaul mein bacchon ko kya future doongi. Mere suppressed ambitions toh kabke khatam ho gaye the, ab in-laws ke permanent shift ke baad meri bachi-kuchi azaadi bhi jayegi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Asking an open question about her core fear regarding the children's future to deepen exploration.
text: Is nayi shuruwat aur aane wali bandishon ke bare mein sochte hue, aapko apne bacchon ke bhavishya ko lekar sabse gehra darr kis baat ka lagta hai?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main unke aage zubaan nahi chala sakti
text: Darr yeh hai ki woh bhi bade hokar mujhe ek kamzor insaan samjhenge jo apne haq ke liye kuch nahi kar paayi. Par main unke aage zubaan nahi chala sakti kyunki mujhe unhe is roj ke kalesh aur tamashe se door rakhna hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring her strict adherence to the maternal duty of shielding her children from household conflict.
text: Ek aadarsh maa ka farz nibhate hue aap bacchon ko jhagdon se bachana chahti hain, bhale hi iski keemat aapko apni pehchan khokar chukani pade.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main unke aage zubaan nahi chala sakti
text: Haan... pehchan toh khatam ho chuki hai. I feel completely cornered in my own house. I want to protest this shift, protect my space, par main unke aage zubaan nahi chala sakti. Aisa lagta hai ki charo taraf deewarein hain aur main dum tod rahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Naming the unspoken feeling of being trapped by family expectations and lack of economic power.
text: Lagta hai jaise aap apne sasural aur farz ke in bandhanon mein puri tarah se bebasi aur ghutan ke jaal mein phans chuki hain, jahan se bahar nikalne ka har raasta band nazar aata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Raasta hai hi kahan? My own parents tell me to adjust. Economic precarity ki wajah se I can't even think of standing on my own feet now. Sab theek dikhane ka natak karna padta hai kyunki sab gharon mein auratein adjust hi karti hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the isolating nature of societal expectations with a soft pause for the stigma cue.
text: Mayke aur samaj se milne wale is lagatar adjustment ke dabao ne aapko andar hi andar bilkul akela kar diya hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul akeli hoon. I just cry in the bathroom sometimes jab saas sasur ke decisions thope jate hain. Meri badhti umar ke taane sunkar aur chup reh kar main apni self-respect roz khoti hoon. Pati ne ek baar bhi nahi poocha mujhse.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating the cultural heaviness of having to accept unilateral decisions silently.
text: Humare parivaaron mein aurton se aksar yehi umeed ki jati hai ki woh bina sawal kiye har badlaav ko khushi se apna lein; aapka is ansuni sthiti mein rona aur dukh mehsus karna bilkul jayaz hai, iska matlab yeh nahi ki aap kisi se kam hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kamzor hi toh maante hain sab mujhe. Mujhe bas thodi azaadi aur respect chahiye thi apne hi ghar mein, par tamasha avoid karne ki keemat par main apni mental peace sacrifice kar rahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Sharing a systemic observation to normalize her feeling of being pressured into the default dutiful path.
text: Aise traditional gharon mein aisi bebasi bahut common hai — sirf aapka yeh haal nahi hai, lekin koi is mudde par bolna pasand nahi karta kyunki samaj mein parivaar ki maryada banaye rakhna sabse upar mana jata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Maryada ke naam par pura ek trap bana diya hai. But main ab thak chuki hoon aise roz ro kar. Main divorce toh nahi le sakti, par main is ghutan mein aise hi pal pal marna bhi nahi chahti. Ab kya karoon main? Kuch samajh nahi aa raha aage ka.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering small, low-risk ways to reclaim a bit of autonomy without disrupting family peace.
text: Is bandhan bhare mahaul mein bina kisi kalesh ke hum do chhote kadam chun sakte hain. Ya toh aap roz din mein 10 minute sirf bacchon ke saath paas ke park mein akele nikalne ka bahana bana lein, ya phir apne phone mein ek private diary maintain karein jahan aap apne suppressed ambitions khul kar likh sakein.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main unke aage zubaan nahi chala sakti
text: Park wala idea theek lag raha hai. Bacchon ke bahane bahar jaana mujhe thoda breathing room de dega. Waise bhi main unke aage zubaan nahi chala sakti shift hone ke issue par, toh shayad ye chhota escape mujhe zinda rakhe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walking her step-by-step through setting up the new short daily routine.
text: Pehle aaj sham ko ghar ka kaam jaldi samet kar bacchon ko park le jane ke liye tayar kijiye… phir wahan baith kar sirf 10 minute unhe khule mein khelte hue dekhiye… bas itna hi aaj ke liye plan karein.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, paas mein hi ek park hai. Bahana bana doongi ki in-laws ke aane se pehle bacchon ko fresh air aadat daalni hai. Unhe bhi ek chhoti azaadi ki zaroorat padegi us mahual mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframing her need for a small break as a structural necessity when facing intense household pressure.
text: Park mein bitaya gaya yeh chhota samay aapke liye ek vyaktigat space ki tarah kaam karega, kyunki aise joint family setups mein apna thoda autonomous waqt nikalna aapke mental survival ke liye bahut ahem hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Mental survival... exactly. Yehi bacha hai ab option. Mere farz aur tamasha na hone dene ki daily koshish mein meri khud ki life toh jaise bilkul pause ho gayi thi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the contrast between her paused life and this new small space.
text: Apni identity ko rok kar sirf sabke liy adjust karte rehne ke baad, ab aapne apne bachaav ke liye ek chhota sa kinara dhoondh liya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ek kinara... sahi kaha. Main zyada kuch kar bhi nahi sakti na. Economic precarity ke chalte ye chhota escape hi meri duniya hogi. I will start this park routine today. 10 minutes sound doable.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Asking her to visualize the feeling of claiming that small, hidden space for herself.
text: Jab aap park mein un 10 minute bacchon ko bina kisi sasural ke aadesh ya darr ke dekhengi, toh aapke andar kya badlav mehsus hoga?

speaker: Seeker
text: Shayad thodi der ke liye I'll feel like myself. Not just a bahu or a wife whose voice doesn't matter. Just me, taking a deep breath without anyone judging my 'badhti umar'.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting her desire to shed the burdensome roles temporarily.
text: Kuch der ke liye hi sahi, par un taano aur bahu ke farz ke bojh ko utaar kar apne asal roop mein rehne ki yeh chahat aapko thodi tasalli deti hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, tasalli milti hai. Aaj kal uski sakht zaroorat hai mujhe. In-laws ke shift hone se pehle mujhe apne is safe space ki aadat daal leni chahiye taaki main pagal na ho jaun.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating the power of acknowledging her existence and planning ahead despite the constraints.
text: Bade badlav ke khauf ke dauran bhi apne sukoon ki tayari pehle se kar lena ek aisi himmat ka saboot hai jo apni paristhitiyon ke aage har nahi maanti, bhale hi kalesh se bachna pade.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main unke aage zubaan nahi chala sakti
text: Thank you for understanding me. Mujhe sach mein dar tha ki aap bologe ki apne haq ke liye lado. Mujhe pata hai main unke aage zubaan nahi chala sakti aur mere jaisi situations mein rehne wali aurton ke liye yahi practical solution hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting her relief at not being pushed into a reckless confrontation.
text: Bahar walo ki wahi purani 'stand lene' ki naseehatein aapko aapki asliyat aur majbooriyon ke aage bilkul impractical aur khatarnak lag rahi thi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Exactly! Main bahut practically sochti hoon. Mere bacchon ko is chhat ki zaroorat hai. Main tamasha karke unki life kharab nahi karungi. 10 minute ka park walk chhota hai par at least mera apna hoga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reinforcing that finding small safe pockets is a valid structural strategy when large changes are blocked.
text: Aise achanak aane wale parivaarik faislon ke beech, apne dimaag ki shanti ke liye chhoti jagah nikalna aur parivaar ki safety maintain karna ek bahut thos aur samajhdari bhari strategy hoti hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: I feel much better. Main aaj shaam se hi shuru karungi. Mujhe ab apne us chhote routine par focus karna hai. I don't feel entirely hopeless anymore.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Asking how she will remind herself of this small victory when the in-laws arrive and pressure mounts again.
text: Aage chalkar jab sasural ke permanent shift hone par dobara se pressure badhega, toh park waale is shanti ke pal ko aap khud ko kaise yaad dilayengi?

speaker: Seeker
text: Main bas khud se kahungi ki theek hai, din ka ek bada hissa unke hisaab se chalta hai, par meri shaam ke 10 minute sirf mere hain. Us waqt par mera haq hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the significant shift from overwhelming despair to claiming a tiny piece of autonomy.
text: Is lambe darr aur mayusi ke safar mein, aaj pehli baar aapne us bebasi ko piche chhod kar apne liye umeed ki ek nayi aur mazboot jagah bana li hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aaj in-laws ke permanent aane ke faisle ne meri lost identity ko aur gehra kar diya, par main bade-buzurgo ke aage nahi bol sakti kyunki 'log kya kahenge' ki dusri shaadi mein bhi nakhre hain. Mummy-Papa ne bhi phone par kaha ki chup-chap seva karo taaki rishta bana rahe aur khandaan ka naam kharab na ho. Maine apne aansuon ko nigal liya hai taaki kisi ko meri takleef ka pata na chale aur sab khush rahen.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the relational pressure to keep everyone happy by completely silencing her own feelings.
text: Tumhare in-laws ke permanent aane se tumhe lag raha hai ki sabko jode rakhne ke liye apni takleef ko side rakhna hi ek aakhiri raasta bacha hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, aur koi option hi nahi choda mere liye. I am literally suffocating here, par main in decisions pe question nahi kar sakti. Doosri shaadi ka bojh itna zyada hota hai, it is so unfair.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the implied fear of judgment and backlash regarding her second marriage.
text: Aisa lag raha hai ki andar hi andar ek darr baith gaya hai ki agar tumne apna haq maanga, toh log doosri shaadi par naye sawal uthane lagenge...

speaker: Seeker
text: Exactly. Ek corporate job mein main apne project ko lead karti hoon, I make tough decisions everyday. Par ghar aate hi, I just shrink. Mujhe apni har ek feeling dabani padti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Asked a question arising from her contrast between her office identity and home identity to deepen exploration.
text: Office mein ek confident lead hone aur ghar par is tarah apni har aawaz ko daba lene ke is fasle mein, tum khud ko kahan dekhti ho?

speaker: Seeker
text: Kahin nahi. I feel like a massive failure. Pehli shaadi fail hui toh logo ne judge kiya, ab agar yeh 'khandaan' wali duty fail hui toh the shame will kill me. Un logon ki nazron mein I am already defective.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledged the stigma cue about the first marriage failure with a soft, shorter mirror of the role pressure.
text: Pichli shaadi ke failure ka stigma aur ek achi bahu banne ke duty ne tumhare andar ki azaadi ko bohot buri tarah dab diya hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haa... isiliye maine apne dimaag ko condition kar liya hai. Apni saari takleef ko chupa kar bas chup-chap seva karni hai, yehi sacrifice sab chahte hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the duration/time-shift now that the move is permanent.
text: Jab se in-laws ke hamesha ke liye shift hone ki baat fix hui hai, tab se lagatar sacrifice karte rehne ka yeh bojh aur bhi zyada feel hone laga hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Bahut zyada. Ab toh har din, har waqt unke strict rules chalenge. Aise daily chup-chap seva karne se yeh rishta aur khandaan ka naam toh bach jayega, par main andar se poori tarah khatam ho jaungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Asked a question about how she manages her daily life while dealing with the named core conflict of losing herself to save the marriage.
text: Yeh jo 'andar se khatam ho jana' wala ahsaas hai, is ghutan ke beech tum apni office aur ghar ki roz ki duties kaise poori kar rahi ho aaj kal?

speaker: Seeker
text: Bas ek machine ki tarah kaam chal raha hai. Kabhi kabhi jab bohot bhari lagta hai toh washroom mein ja kar ro leti hoon chupke se. Fir aansu poch kar wapas laptop ke aage baith jati hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflected the specific unexpressed feeling of being TRAPPED/HELPLESS due to the relational pressure (C3).
text: Lagta hai ki is 'log kya kahenge' aur duty ki expectation ke beech, tum khud ko bilkul trapped aur helpless mehsoos kar rahi ho, jahan is cycle se bahar nikalne ka koi raasta hi nahi dikh raha.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha aapne. I am completely trapped. Doosri aurton ko dekhti hoon toh lagta hai woh kitni azaad hain, but for me, this entire expectation of adjusting at all costs is a huge cage.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validated her feeling of suffocation as culturally normal for working women dealing with dual burdens, separating her worth from adjusting perfectly.
text: Tumhara is cage mein aakar ghutan mehsoos karna bohot lazmi hai. Metro cities mein bhi working women se aksar yahi umeed ki jati hai ki ghar ki shanti unhi ka farz hai. Par in unrealistic umeedo ke aage thak jana tumhari koi kamzori nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thank you for saying that. Sometimes I genuinely feel ki main hi shayad ungrateful hoon. Mummy-papa kehte hain ki betiyon ko toh aadat daal hi leni chahiye, uske bina rishta nahi chalta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Used a brief systemic anecdote to normalize the extreme pressure she faces regarding her second marriage.
text: Humare yahan married working women mein yeh extreme adjusting aur compromise ka pattern bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi khul ke bolega nahi kyunki sab is khandaan ki izzat aur log kya kahenge ke bojh tale dabbe hote hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: It's so unfair na? Koi samjhega hi nahi ki main andar se kya go-through kar rahi hoon. Mujhe ab sach mein samajh nahi aa raha, is nayi permanent situation mein ab kya karoon ki thodi si saans le sakoon?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalized her struggle as a structural flaw of society's expectations on marriage preservation, not her personal inability to cope.
text: Aksar humare samaj mein marriage bachane ki saari responsibility sirf ek insaan ke kandhon par dalne ko theek maan liya gaya hai, par asal mein yeh us rigid social structure ka flaw hai, tumhara personal failure bilkul bhi nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: I know... par practical level par toh reality yehi hai ki mujhe hi jhelna padega. Unka yahan aana ab final hai. Main unki chup-chap seva ke is daily loop se apne aap ko thoda bahut kaise bachaun?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provided two quick, <10 min options that fit her routine without challenging the family structure directly.
text: Aise mein do choti cheezein try kar sakte hain bina kisi ko bataye. Ya toh, office se aane ke baad duty shuru karne se pehle strictly 10 minute balcony ya room mein akele baitho. Ya phir, kaam ke beech jab bhi ghutan ho, apne phone par ek hidden note mein apne thoughts likh do. Kya inmein se kuch feasible lag raha hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Phone pe note likhna shayad riski ho. Par haan, main kapde change karne ka bahana karke room mein 10 minute akele baithne ka zaroor try kar sakti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walked through the chosen suggestion step-by-step using the required phrasing.
text: Pehle yeh karo ki aate hi seedha apne room mein jao aur darwaza lagao… phir 10 minute bina phone ya kaam ke bare mein soche apni saans lene par dhyan do… bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: It sounds very doable, par mere liye yeh bhi bada task feel ho raha hai. Dar lagta hai ki agar in-laws ne notice kiya ki main aate hi aaram karne chali gayi, toh khandaan mein baatein shuru ho jayengi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored her fear that claiming even small personal time might disrupt the fragile family peace.
text: Tumhare andar abhi bhi wahi darr baitha hai ki khud ke liye nikala gaya yeh chota sa waqt bhi ghar mein nayi problems aur taane le aayega...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, kyunki 'log kya kahenge' wali purani soch unki bhi hai. Agar unhe laga ki main thakne ka bahana bana kar duty avoid kar rahi hoon, toh turant mummy-papa ko complaint jayegi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Asked a question exploring the consequence of the 10-minute break on her energy and patience.
text: Agar sach mein ek din unhone kuch complain kar bhi di, toh yeh jo 10 minute ki shanti hai, woh tumhari baaki poore din ki duty par kaisa asar daalegi?

speaker: Seeker
text: Shayad main thodi kam frustrated rahungi. Agar main mental breakdown nahi face karungi, toh at least unki chup-chap seva karna mere liye physically possible ho payega us 10 minute recharge ke baad.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validated her self-care approach as necessary maintenance, separating it from selfishness.
text: Yeh bilkul theek hai ki tum us exhaustion ko thoda break dena chahti ho. Ek lambe routine mein apne aap ko thoda recharge karne ka haq hona swarth nahi hai, balki is expectations ke bojh mein khud ko jode rakhne ka zaruri kadam hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aap theek keh rahe ho. Aaj tak main humesha in-laws aur mummy-papa ki khushi ke aage apni simple needs ko unimportant manti thi. Par lagta hai ab I cannot run on an empty tank.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflected the underlying sense of moving from HELPLESSNESS towards a tiny bit of self-acknowledgment.
text: Lagta hai ki is lambe aur thaka dene wale struggle ke baad, ab tum khud ko us trapped aur helpless mentality se thoda sa upar uthane ka hausla juta rahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Hausla toh bahut chaiye hoga. It's really not easy to untrain yourself from years of being told that your needs just don't matter in a marriage.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Re-normalized the difficulty of untraining systemic conditioning regarding women in traditional marriages.
text: Aksar bachpan se betiyon ko yahi condition kiya jaata hai ki chupchap sehnshilta hi ek successful rishte ka base hai. Yeh sadiyon ki deep conditioning ek raat mein nahi badalti, isiliye khud par harsh na hote hue chote kadam hi kafi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haa, I will try to take it one day at a time. Kal jab main office se wapas aungi, I will strictly follow that 10-minute break without feeling totally guilty about it.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provided a second small supportive action for moments of severe emotional overload.
text: Ek chota option aage ke liye bhi try kar sakte hain. Jab washroom mein akele ro kar niklo, toh thande paani se chehra dhote waqt, aaine mein dekh kar bas ek second khud ko yaad dilana ki tumhari identity sirf ghar tak meemid nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Main aaine mein toh dekhti hoon, par sirf aankhein theek karne ke liye taaki kisi ko pata na chale. Next time, I will look at myself and remind myself of my corporate identity and that I am capable.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored her role/duty shift back to acknowledging her independent capability.
text: Ab tak tum aaine mein sirf ek majboor bahu ko aur uske aansu ko dekhti aayi ho, par aage se usme apni mazboot professional pehchaan ko bhi ek jagah dena chahti ho...

speaker: Seeker
text: Yes. Mujhe meri lost identity ka ehsaas apne paas rakhna hai, chahe chote chote tukdon mein hi kyun na ho. Aakhir baaki waqt chup-chap seva toh karni hi hai, par ab main poori tarah apne aap ko nahi bhulaungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validated her quiet resilience and small steps towards reclaiming her identity amidst familial pressure.
text: Yeh sunkar bahut achha lag raha hai ki tum apne wajood ke un hisson ko dobara ikattha karne ki neeyat rakhti ho. Dono roles ke beech yeh chota sa space banana koi asaan kaam nahi hai, par tumhari yeh pehel waqai mein himmat wali hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main unka sir jhukne nahi de sakti
text: Main unka sir jhukne nahi de sakti... chahe jo ho jaye. Sasu-ma ne ghar aate hi keh diya ki meri age ab 40 touch kar rahi hai aur ab mujhe sirf bhagwan aur parivaar ki seva karni chahiye. Apne andar ki ghabrahat aur feelings ko kurban karke, main bas ek aadarsh bahu banne ka farz nibha rahi hoon taaki pati ka samman bana rahe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the deep sacrifice of her own feelings to protect her husband's honor and avoid familial conflict.
text: Aisa lag raha hai ki sasu-ma ke taano ke beech, aap apne pati ke samman aur parivaar ki shanti ko bachane ke liye apni har saans aur khwahish ko daba rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main unka sir jhukne nahi de sakti
text: Aur kar bhi kya sakti hoon? Humari biradari aisi hi hai. Agar saas ki aage zabaan chalai, toh baahar wale jeene nahi denge. Log kahenge kaisi aurat hai jo apne hi pati ka ghar tod rahi hai. Isliye main unka sir jhukne nahi de sakti. Par andar hi andar is anxiety se dum ghutta hai mera din bhar.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Softly mirroring the feared consequence to validate her anxiety while responding to the stigma cue with a shorter response.
text: Biradari ke tano aur bahishkar ka darr aapko roz apni hi aawaz ko maarne par majboor kar raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan... roz subah uthti hoon toh lagta hai jaise kandho par ek bohot bhari pahaad rakha ho. 'Expired' bolti hain mujhe... kya 40 ki umar mein aurat ki koi zindagi nahi hoti? Bas pooja aur rasoi? Par pati ke muh se ek shabd nahi nikalta. Sab mujhse hi farz nibhane ki umeed rakhte hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring her role as the sole bearer of familial duty while her husband stays silent.
text: Bina kisi ke saath ke, akele hi ek aadarsh bahu aur patni ka sara farz uthane mein aap bohot akela aur bojhal mehsoos kar rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main unka sir jhukne nahi de sakti
text: Bohot akela lagta hai. Kabhi lagta hai roun baith kar, par time kahan hai? Subah se raat tak seva mein nikal jata hai. Unki dawai, khana, sab dekhna padta hai. Mere andar itni ghabrahat bhari rehti hai ki dil tezi se dhadakta hai. Main unka sir jhukne nahi de sakti, isliye dard bhi chhupana padta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Asking a gentle question about her unaddressed emotional needs amidst her constant caregiving.
text: Sabka dhyan rakhte hue aur pati ka samman bachane ki is lagatar koshish mein, aapne aakhri baar thoda thehar kar apne mann ki aawaz kab suni thi?

speaker: Seeker
text: Apne baare mein sochne ki fursat hi kahan hai? Yaad bhi nahi. Mujhe bas ye yaad rehta hai ki kahin koi galti na ho jaye aur sasu-ma bawal na khada kar dein. Mere apne sapne toh jaise shadi ke saath hi khatam ho gaye. Ab toh bas ek robot ki tarah kaam kar rahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Highlighting the long duration of erasing her own identity to function merely as a caretaker.
text: Itne lambe samay se khud ko bhula kar sirf ek machine ki tarah doosron ki zindagi ki dekh bhal karna sach mein bohot takleef-deh hota hoga.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main unka sir jhukne nahi de sakti
text: Takleef hoti hai par kya karun. Sasu-ma roz naye taane maarti hain. Ki main unke bete ke layak nahi, ki ab meri age ho chuki hai. Par main unka sir jhukne nahi de sakti, isliye chupchap rasoi mein aansu poch leti hoon. Bahar walo ko pata chala toh tamasha banega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting how she hides her pain in isolation to protect the family from outside gossip.
text: Apne hi ghar mein aansu chhipane padte hain, kyunki aapko lagta hai ki aapka dard sunne ke bajaye log usko baahar naya tamasha bana denge.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul waisa hi hoga. Mujhe ab lagne laga hai ki main is ghar mein puri tarah phans gayi hoon. Ek aisi jagah jahan meri koi ahmiyat nahi, bas seva karne wali bacha kachi bheed hoon. Mujhe is aadarsh bahu ke natak se akelepan aur ghutan hone lagi hai. But I can't break my family.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Naming the core emotion of feeling trapped by her desire to keep the family together.
text: Lagta hai ki is parivaar ko tootne se bachane ki aakhri koshish mein, aap poori tarah se 'trapped' aur lachar mehsoos kar rahi hain, jaise khud ke liye koi rasta hi na bacha ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Rasta toh sach mein nahi hai. Kahan jaungi is umar mein? Is ghutan mein kabhi kabhi sochti hoon ki kya puri zindagi aise hi nikal jayegi? Ek 'expired' bahu bankar, jiska kaam sirf seva karna hai? Par pati ka chehra dekhti hoon toh phir farz yaad aa jata hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her feeling of entrapment against the cultural reality where a woman's worth is often tied to her service.
text: Aapki yeh lachari aur ghutan bilkul laazmi hai, khaas karke humari society mein jahan ek aurat ke samman ko aksar uski bina thake farz nibhane ki aadat se hi naapa jata hai; par yaad rakhiye, aapki asli pehchaan in tano se kam nahi hoti, aap bohot kurbani de rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kurbani toh sab auratein deti hain apne ghar mein. Par badle mein kam se kam izzat toh milni chahiye na. Aurat hone ka matlab yeh toh nahi ki sasu-ma aate hi mujhe mitti me mila dein. Main apne farz se piche nahi hat rahi, par ye roz ke taane ab chubhte hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframing the emerging frustration back into her core value of duty to prevent premature escalation of anger.
text: Taano ke bawajood aap apne parivaar ko baandh kar rakhne ke aadarsh farz ko puri lagan se nibha rahi hain, bhale hi ab woh chubhan bardasht ke bahar ho rahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main unka sir jhukne nahi de sakti
text: Haan, bardasht khatam ho rahi hai. Aur sach kahun toh ab mujhe andar hi andar gussa aane laga hai. Sasu-ma par, apne pati par jo chup rehte hain, aur un sab par bhi. Itna gussa aata hai ki lagta hai chikhu chillau, par main unka sir jhukne nahi de sakti na biradari mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalizing the unspoken anger and burden of homemakers in the community.
text: Apne aas paas aur rishtedari mein maine dekha hai ki aise akelepan ka aur gusse ka dabaav bahut common hai — yeh akele aapka dukh nahi hai, lekin bahu hone ke nate koi bolta nahi kyunki community exclusion aur biradari ka darr sabko chup kara deta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul sahi keh rahe hain aap. Sab izzat ke chakkar mein aawaz daba lete hain. Par is dabbe gusse aur anxiety ne meri tabiyat kharab kar di hai. Din bhar sir bhari rehta hai. Mujhe iss roz roz ki tension se thodi shanti chahiye. Batao kya karoon main? Is mahaul mein thodi theek kaise rahoon?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her readiness to find a solution by mirroring her physical exhaustion and desire for peace.
text: Itne salon ke dabaav aur lagatar bhari sir ke beech, ab aap dil se apne liye ek choti si rahat ka raasta chahti hain jo apko bikharne na de.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, raahat nahi mili toh sach mein bikhar jaungi is kalesh mein. Kuch aasaan sa raasta jo bina kisi bade jhagde ke ho. Main ghar nahi chhod sakti, par main is pagalpan mein aur nahi ji sakti. Please, koi raasta hai kya theek rehne ka?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering small, manageable suggestions to vent emotions safely within her constrained environment.
text: Bina kisi jhagde ke shanti dhoondhne ke liye hum do chhote kadam le sakte hain. Kya aap din mein jab sasu-ma araam kar rahi hon, tab 5 minute akele baith kar apni saanso par dhyan dena pasand karengi, ya phir ek diary mein roz sirf apne mann ki baatein bina roke likhna chahengi?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main unka sir jhukne nahi de sakti
text: Diary likhna theek rahega mere hisaab se. Kam se kam jo gussa baahar nahi nikal paati, wo panno par toh chala jayega. Saanso par dhyan dena theek hai par wo is taano ka gussa shant nahi karega. Main unka sir jhukne nahi de sakti sabke saamne, par diary mein toh main apna dil khol kar bhadas nikal sakti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Guiding her step-by-step on how to implement the diary writing habit safely.
text: Apne gusse ko chup chap panno par utaarne ke liye diary likhna ekdum sahi aur surakshit raasta hai. Pehle yeh karo ki aaj dopahar jab sab so jayein, toh bas do minute ke liye ek purani notebook mein apna sabse bada dukh likho… phir use aisi jagah chhupa do jahan kisi ki nazar na pade… bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, yeh aaram se ho sakta hai. Dopahar ko 3 se 4 baje sab so jate hain tab rasoi saaf karte waqt main free hoti hoon thodi der. Wahi baith kar hi us notebook mein likh lungi. Kam se kam is darr se toh bachaungi khud ko ki koi meri aawaz sun lega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframing her need to vent as a structural reaction to the unfair expectations of the ideal daughter-in-law role.
text: Aksar jab humein ek aadarsh bahu ke sakht khanche mein fit hone ko majboor kiya jata hai, toh aisi diary hi yaad dilati hai ki aapka gussa aur dard kisi kharabi ka nateeja nahi, balki barson se chali aa rahi is society ki unfair parampara ka ek bhoj hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ye parampara sach mein bohot khokli aur unfair hai. Bas auraton se hi umar bhar seva mangti hai. Khair, is system ko toh main akele badal nahi sakti, par shayad notebook mein sab nikalne se meri anxiety thodi kam ho jaye. Mera bhaari sir thoda theek ho.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring her realistic approach to self-care without challenging the unchangeable system.
text: Akele is poore system se takrane ki jagah, aap bohot samajhdaari se apni parivaarik duty nibhate hue apne dimag aur sehat ko bachane ka ek chota rasta apna rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main unka sir jhukne nahi de sakti
text: Samajhdari hi karni padegi. Warna biradari wale jeene nahi denge, jisse pati ka samman dubega aur main unka sir jhukne nahi de sakti kabhi bhi. Par haan, ab apne is tute hue astitva ko seene ka yeh ek sahara zaroor rakhungi apne paas.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the new sense of steady resolve she has found amidst the chaos.
text: Lagta hai ki ab aapke bheetar aage badhne ka ek naya 'determination' aur thehraav aa gaya hai, jahan apne farz ke beech aapne khud ko bilkul mita dene se inkaar kar diya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bina kisi ke sahare ke shayad ye akeli cheez hai jo mere haath mein hai. Main ladai nahi kar sakti unki baaton se, sasu-ma ka nazariya ab waise bhi nahi badlega. Par diary mein likh kar main in taano ko khud par poori tarah haawi nahi hone dungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating the creation of a boundary through writing, avoiding new conflicts.
text: Ghar ke us kalesh aur chubhni baaton ko apne mann se seedha panno par utaar dena, aapko un taano ke zehar se bacha lega aur rishto mein aag lagne se rokega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Aaj dopahar se hi main iski shuruaat karungi. Pata hai ki kal phir wahi pooja, rasoi aur 'expired' wale taane sunne hain, lekin ab mere paas unhe nikalne ki ek choti si jagah toh hogi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Praising her courage to establish a safe space for herself within a difficult environment.
text: Rozana unn hi baaton ka samna karte hue bhi, chup chap panno par apni aawaz zinda rakhne ki aapki yeh pehel waqai himmat wali hai, aur yeh batati hai ki umar ya taane aapke wajood ko khatam nahi kar sakte.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aapka bahut shukriya mujhe aaram se sunne ke liye. Ghar ke andar toh koi aisi baat karta hi nahi jahan sasu-ma ki seva ke aage bahu ki koi takleef samjhi jaye. Ab thoda bojh halka lag raha hai kandho se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the lightness and relief she feels after finally speaking out.
text: Itne samay ki chuppi ko aakhirkaar thoda bol kar aur naya sahara dhoondh kar, aaj aapko us bhaari bojh se kafi rahat mili hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bohat rahat mili hai. Main chalti hoon ab, pati ke aane ka waqt hone wala hai aur mujhe dinner ki tayari karni hai. Apna farz toh main theek se nibhaungi, par aaj diary wala kaam bhi pakka karungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Closing by reframing her diary as an enduring space of truth that balances her societal duties.
text: Ghar ki unn sabhi zimmedariyon ko shanti se poora karte hue, yeh choti si aadat aapko har din yeh yaad dilayegi ki bhale hi samaj mein aurat ke kaayde kitne bhi sakht hon, aapki apni aawaz us diary mein humesha azaad aur surakshit hai.
